TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Papotalay_a_lahod_to‚Äôedip, title = Papotalay_a_lahod_to‚Äôedip, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Papotalay_a_lahod_to‚Äôedip} }

S.FORM: Papotalay a lahod to'edip Papotalay no kasata'edi'edip no lahod, oya cingci ato hayci sakapot. Pinengnengan Mirakarakay lahod to'edip Sasifoay to'edip Maladacay to'edip Kasacoelisan to'edip Tatiri'an a tilid

S.FORM: Papotalay a lahod to'edip Papotalay no kasata'edi'edip no lahod, oya cingci ato hayci sakapot. Pinengnengan Mirakarakay lahod to'edip Sasifoay to'edip Maladacay to'edip Kasacoelisan to'edip Tatiri'an a tilid
